default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing engagements with customers, deal pipeline, and scaling the partnership between Anthropic and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current engagements with Home Base and D-Graph are going well, delivering value quickly](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need to align on deal qualification, who owns what in the sales process, and involving Marcel at the right stage](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Opportunity to partner with tools like SEMrush and headless CMS platforms](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Discuss potential co-marketing and productizing the offering](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Engagements

  - [Home Base and D-Graph engagements delivering value quickly through content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Onboarding process: \~4-5 hours of calls in first 2 weeks to gather info](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Templatizing workflows for keyword research, content creation, review process](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Using tools like Notion, Slack, loom for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Exploring hiring prompt engineers to scale](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

### Deal Pipeline

  - [Qualify deals first based on budget, domain authority \>30](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [For qualified leads, do discovery call -\> demo with outputs -\> discuss managed service](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Bring Marcel in at the managed service discussion stage](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Pipeline includes leads from workshop, existing free trial customers, new intros](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

### Partnership Scaling

  - [Align on who owns deal stages (qualification, demo, pricing, etc)](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Discuss potential investment from both sides to scale offering](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Explore co-marketing and positioning as discounted enterprise plans](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

### Integration Opportunities

  - [Explore integrations with SEO tools like SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
  - [Partner with headless CMS platforms like Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Firm up process for qualifying and involving Marcel in deals](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Discuss co-marketing ideas and potential investments on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Follow up on specific pipeline opportunities (Swoogo, Unstructured, CreatorIQ, Strapi)](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [Explore integration partnerships with SEMrush, headless CMS platforms](https://fathom.video/share/_kzWsg1hmz2w-8HkmAwBmqKzz6SbvpDS?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

action_items.description: Discuss how Marcel will be referenced in deals and decide on approach
Determine pricing and discounting strategy for deals on a case by case basis
Discuss potential co-marketing opportunities and ideas to accelerate growth and scale the partnership
Reach out to Unstructured to reintroduce the idea of content automation and schedule a follow up call
Reach out to CreatorIQ to discuss their programmatic content use case and schedule a discovery call
Follow up with Strappy in June to determine their interest in content automation
Follow up with Metadata contacts to explore potential partnership opportunities
